title: Introductory Python Foundations

topics.title: Variables
topics.learning_objective: Understand how names refer to values in small Python examples.
practice_prompt_templates: Create a variable for a learner's score and update it after one practice attempt.
revision_prompts: Explain what changes when a variable is reassigned.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can trace simple assignments without confusing name and value.

topics.title: Data Types
topics.learning_objective: Distinguish strings, integers, floats, booleans, and simple conversions.
practice_prompt_templates: Classify a short list of Python literals by type.
revision_prompts: Name one case where converting a string to an integer is necessary.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can predict the type of common literal values.

topics.title: Conditionals
topics.learning_objective: Use if, elif, and else to choose between simple paths.
practice_prompt_templates: Write a conditional that chooses a revision prompt from a score threshold.
revision_prompts: Describe what makes a condition evaluate to true or false.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can trace which branch runs in a short conditional.

topics.title: Loops
topics.learning_objective: Trace repetition with for and while loops using bounded examples.
practice_prompt_templates: Predict the output of a short loop over three practice scores.
revision_prompts: Explain how a loop knows when to stop.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can trace each loop iteration and identify the stopping condition.

topics.title: Functions
topics.learning_objective: Define reusable behavior with parameters and return values.
practice_prompt_templates: Repair a function that should return a revised score.
revision_prompts: Explain the difference between printing and returning a value.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can identify inputs, body, and return value in a small function.

topics.title: Lists
topics.learning_objective: Use ordered collections for groups of related values.
practice_prompt_templates: Store three topic scores in a list and compute a simple total.
revision_prompts: Describe when an ordered list is useful.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can index and iterate through a small list safely.

topics.title: Dictionaries
topics.learning_objective: Use key-value mappings for named lookups.
practice_prompt_templates: Create a dictionary mapping topic names to confidence scores.
revision_prompts: Explain why a dictionary key should be meaningful.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can retrieve and update values by key.

topics.title: Debugging Basics
topics.learning_objective: Read simple errors, inspect assumptions, and isolate small failures.
practice_prompt_templates: Given a short error message, identify the first value or line to inspect.
revision_prompts: List two checks to make before rewriting code.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can describe a first debugging step from a small failure.

topics.title: Mini-Project Review
topics.learning_objective: Combine variables, data types, conditionals, loops, functions, lists, dictionaries, and debugging in a short local review activity.
practice_prompt_templates: Sketch a local study tracker that records topic scores and recommends one revision topic.
revision_prompts: Name the most fragile part of your mini-project and explain how you would test it.
topics.mastery_signal: Learner can connect core Python concepts in one small scenario.

quiz_prompt_templates: Trace this short loop and explain each iteration in one sentence.
Repair this small function so it returns the intended value.
Choose whether a list or dictionary best fits this local study-tracker task.
Read this simple error message and choose the first value to inspect.
revision_prompts: Summarize today's topic in plain language.
Write one question you can answer locally without using cloud services.
Identify the prerequisite topic that most affects today's topic.
Mark one concept for spaced review in the local progress tracker.
